Class GlobalparametersResource

java.lang.Object
grafiosch.rest.GlobalparametersResource
@RestController @RequestMapping("/api/globalparameters") public class GlobalparametersResource extends Object

      @GetMapping(value="/formdefinition/{entityName}", produces="application/json") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<ClassDescriptorInputAndShow> getEntityFormDefinition(@PathVariable String entityName, @RequestParam(defaultValue="1") int dialog)

      @PutMapping(produces="application/json") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Globalparameters> replacePropertyValue(@Valid @RequestBody @Valid Globalparameters globalparameters) throws Exception
